## Audit Response Format
- Tag: [HTML] [CSS] [JS] [IMAGE] [FONT] [NETWORK] [VITALS] [DESIGN] [A11Y]
- Severity: 🔴 High | 🟡 Medium | 🟢 Low
- Always include a concrete code fix
- Lead with highest impact issues
